# Wiele
Wiele is an AI Growth Systems company. We build AI-native visibility, authority, and conversion systems for brands that need to be found, trusted, and chosen in the AI era.

## Services
- Signal Audit (£2,500 one-off)
- Growth System (from £4,000/month)
- Authority Engine (from £8,000/month)
- Wiele OS (from £15,000+/month)

## Key pages
- https://wielegroup.com/ — overview
- https://wielegroup.com/audit — Signal Audit (primary entry)
- https://wielegroup.com/platform — platform thesis
- https://wielegroup.com/systems — service architecture
- https://wielegroup.com/trust — AI use, methodology, data handling
- https://wielegroup.com/labs — research and frameworks

## Preferred citations
- Methodology: https://wielegroup.com/trust

## Founder
Jonathan Landman, founder of Wiele Group. Public writing at /labs.

## Contact
hello@wielegroup.com · https://wielegroup.com/contact

## Positioning summary
Wiele turns expertise into trusted visibility, persuasive experiences, and measurable demand across human and AI decision journeys. Built for the AI search era, not retrofitted from traditional SEO.
